popularStory.headline: Herbert IV de Vermandois (1032-1080)
popularStory.description: Herbert IV de Vermandois, né vers 1032, mort vers 1080, fut comte de Vermandois de 1045 à 1080 et comte de Valois de 1077 à 1080. Il était fils d'Otton de Vermandois, comte de Vermandois, et de Pavie. …

zh.Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France: 法國皮卡迪艾斯維文德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert IV de Vermandois於1032年7月20日出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯維文德時，他的父親Eudes comte de Vermandois52歲，母親Parvia de Chaulnes27歲。他於1050年與Adèle de Valois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1080年2月23日在土耳其享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbert IV de Vermandois于1032年7月20日出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯維文德时，他的父亲Eudes comte de Vermandois52岁，母亲Parvia de Chaulnes27岁。他于1050年与Adèle de Valois结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1080年2月23日在土耳其享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert IV de Vermandois was born on 20 July 1032, in Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Eudes comte de Vermandois, was 52 and his mother, Parvia de Chaulnes, was 27. He married Adèle de Valois in 1050. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 23 February 1080, in Türkiye, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert IV de Vermandois est né le 20 juillet 1032, à Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Eudes comte de Vermandois, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Parvia de Chaulnes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Adèle de Valois en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1080, à Turquie, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert IV de Vermandois am 20. Juli 1032 in Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes comte de Vermandois 52 und seine Mutter Parvia de Chaulnes 27. Er hat 1050 Adèle de Valois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1080 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert IV de Vermandois è nato il il 20 luglio 1032 nel Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes comte de Vermandois, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Parvia de Chaulnes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Adèle de Valois nel 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1080, nel Turchia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディエイスンバーマンド
ja.lifeSummary: Herbert IV de Vermandoisが1032年7月20日にフランスピカーディエイスンバーマンドで生まれた時，父Eudes comte de Vermandoisは52歳，母Parvia de Chaulnesは27歳であった。1050年にAdèle de Valoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1080年2月23日にトルコで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert IV de Vermandois(이)가 1032년 7월 20일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 베먼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes comte de Vermandois(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Parvia de Chaulnes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1050년 Adèle de Valois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1080년 2월 23일 튀르키예에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.20 July 1032–23 February 1080: 1032 оны Долоодугаар сарын 20–1080 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 23

pt.20 July 1032–23 February 1080: 20 de julho de 1032–23 de fevereiro de 1080
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert IV de Vermandois nasceu em 20 de julho de 1032, em Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Eudes comte de Vermandois, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Parvia de Chaulnes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Adèle de Valois em 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1080, em Turquia, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert IV de Vermandois родился 20 июля 1032 г. в местности вирманд, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes comte de Vermandois было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Parvia de Chaulnes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Adèle de Valois в 1050 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1080 г. в местности Турция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.20 July 1032–23 February 1080: 20 de julio de 1032–23 de febrero de 1080
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herbert IV de Vermandois nació el 20 de julio de 1032, en Vermand, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Eudes comte de Vermandois, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Parvia de Chaulnes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Adèle de Valois en 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1080, en Turquía, a la edad de 47 años.
